segments.text: I'm going to start with a little bit of support here so I'm going to I want to just get this little Junction here softened so this is the junction where orbicularis orus has attachments to the dermis on the top lip and then it loses those attachments forming a line when the cheek comes down that causes a change in the Contour so I can just hook those two surfaces up support them so they flow more I'm in it this is an intradermal mid-dermis type injection like all the injections where we're trying to strengthen the dermis and resist gravity I'm in that level if you're in the fat it doesn't really work that well [Music] my thoughts make me I

okay but um let's not gonna allow me to create the definition I wanted in that point so try and find another point then we'll come out I don't come all the way out this will save me three injections because less traumatic for me to then go and do a volumizing injection through the same hole aspirate look how easy it is by the way to aspirate nice and still doesn't the movement is scanning the area a little bit small transforming vessel I will get positive squeeze to shape it Escape [Music] run away

transcript: I'm going to start with a little bit of support here so I'm going to I want to just get this little Junction here softened so this is the junction where orbicularis orus has attachments to the dermis on the top lip and then it loses those attachments forming a line when the cheek comes down that causes a change in the Contour so I can just hook those two surfaces up support them so they flow more I'm in it this is an intradermal mid-dermis type injection like all the injections where we're trying to strengthen the dermis and resist gravity I'm in that level if you're in the fat it doesn't really work that well [Music] my thoughts make me I I [Music] [Applause] that will always [Music] I'm looking for so much more don't leave me here searching for times are getting crazy everything seems hate there's some place [Music] angle here on the lower lip if you want to meet up with this part of the chin so I'm choosing at the lower lip angle here's my entry point is dictated by where I want the bevel to end up Edge my way in that's right we have tracks a little bit there that's okay but um let's not gonna allow me to create the definition I wanted in that point so try and find another point then we'll come out I don't come all the way out this will save me three injections because less traumatic for me to then go and do a volumizing injection through the same hole aspirate look how easy it is by the way to aspirate nice and still doesn't the movement is scanning the area a little bit small transforming vessel I will get positive squeeze to shape it Escape [Music] run away [Music] I'm gonna stay out of the Vermilion border and just try and add a bit of pink bit of projection [Music] [Applause] what a way to [Music] find a way run away from my way [Music] [Music]
